title: echogithub: Getting started
text: Easily find available branches given GitHub repo.
code: branches <- echogithub::github_branches(owner = "RajLabMSSM",                                         repo = "echolocatoR") ## Searching for all branches in: RajLabMSSM/echolocatoR ## 5 branch(es) found:  ##  - dev ##  - echoverse ##  - gh-pages ##  - master ##  - v1 print(branches) ## [1] "dev"       "echoverse" "gh-pages"  "master"    "v1"

title: echogithub: Getting started
text: can also check whether particular branch exists. default, github_branches() interprets “master” “main” synonymous returns whichever one actually exists.
code: branches <- echogithub::github_branches(owner = "RajLabMSSM",                                         repo = "echolocatoR",                                         branch = "main") ## Searching for all branches in: RajLabMSSM/echolocatoR ## 1 matching branch(es) found:  ##  - master print(branches) ## [1] "master"

title: echogithub: Getting started
text: github_files() lets easily: Search GitHub repo (access ) files. Filter files regex query. Download files local computer (can increase nThread speed download via parallelisation). NOTE: search private repos, make sure GitHub token supplied token argument, saved ~/.Renviron file, e.g.: GITHUB_TOKEN=<token_here>

title: echogithub: Getting started
code: files <- echogithub::github_files(owner = "RajLabMSSM",                                   repo = "Fine_Mapping_Shiny",                                   query = ".md$",                                   ignore.case = TRUE,                                   download = TRUE) ## Searching for all branches in: RajLabMSSM/Fine_Mapping_Shiny ## 1 matching branch(es) found:  ##  - master ## 6,529 files found in GitHub repo: RajLabMSSM/Fine_Mapping_Shiny ## 1 file(s) found matching query. ## + Downloading 1 files. ## Returning pre-existing file: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/RajLabMSSM/Fine_Mapping_Shiny/master/README.md knitr::kable(utils::head(files))

title: echogithub: Getting started
text: several functions searching GitHub Pages websites associated specific GitHub repos.

title: echogithub: Getting started
text: First, since GitHub repos use GitHub Pages, find whether one interested exists. exist, function simply return NULL set error = FALSE.
code: ghpages_url <- echogithub::github_pages(owner = "RajLabMSSM",                                         repo = "echolocatoR") ## Returning valid GitHub Pages URL for repo: RajLabMSSM/echolocatoR. print(ghpages_url) ## [1] "https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echolocatoR/" ghpages_null <- echogithub::github_pages(owner = "RajLabMSSM",                                          repo = "Fine_Mapping_Shiny",                                          error = FALSE) ## Cannot find GitHub Pages URL for repo RajLabMSSM/Fine_Mapping_Shiny. Returning NULL. print(ghpages_null) ## NULL

title: echogithub: Getting started
text: github_pages_vignettes allows easily gather vignettes across multiple GitHub Pages websites .

title: echogithub: Getting started
code: vdt <- echogithub::github_pages_vignettes(     owner = c("RajLabMSSM", "neurogenomics"),     repo = c("echodata", "MungeSumstats") ) knitr::kable(utils::head(vdt))

title: echogithub: Getting started
text: can also use as_toc = TRUE argument turn vignettes data.table HTML Table Contents (TOC). echodata echodata echolocatoR Finemapping Portal
code: toc <- echogithub::github_pages_vignettes(     owner = c("RajLabMSSM", "neurogenomics"),     repo = c("echodata", "MungeSumstats"),     as_toc = TRUE )

title: echogithub: Getting started
text: DESCRIPTION files contain essential information R package. However, finding importing always straightforward (e.g. package yet installed). echogithub::description_extract searches variety sources (e.g. local files, local installations, GitHub) find correct DESCRIPTION file import easy--use description format. parses extract relevant information.

title: echogithub: Getting started
text: description_extract takes object extracts parses just fields need, returning named list.
code: res <- echogithub::description_extract(     refs = c("RajLabMSSM/echolocatoR",              "RajLabMSSM/echogithub",              "RajLabMSSM/rworkflows") ) ## When refs is provided, paths must have the same length (or be set to NULL). Setting paths=NULL. ## Cannot find DESCRIPTION for: echolocatoR ## Importing cached file: /github/home/.cache/R/rworkflows/RajLabMSSM.echolocatoR_DESCRIPTION methods::show(res) ## Key: <repo> ##                   package         owner        repo ##                    <char>        <char>      <char> ## 1:  RajLabMSSM/echogithub    RajLabMSSM  echogithub ## 2: RajLabMSSM/echolocatoR    RajLabMSSM echolocatoR ## 3:  RajLabMSSM/rworkflows neurogenomics  rworkflows ##                                                          authors ##                                                           <char> ## 1: Brian Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj, Hiranyamaya Dash ## 2:                   Brian Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj ## 3:  Brian Schilder, Alan Murphy, Hiranyamaya  Dash, Nathan Skene

what: echogithub: Echoverse module: Extract data and metadata from GitHub.
title: Echoverse Module: Extract Data and Metadata from GitHub
text: R package part echoverse suite supports echolocatoR: automated genomic fine-mapping pipeline. use echogithub, please cite: Brian M Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj (2021). echolocatoR: automated end--end statistical functional genomic fine-mapping pipeline. Bioinformatics, btab658. https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btab658

title: Echoverse Module: Extract Data and Metadata from GitHub
code: if(!require("BiocManager")) install.packages("BiocManager")  BiocManager::install("RajLabMSSM/echogithub") library(echogithub)

title: Echoverse Module: Extract Data and Metadata from GitHub
text: Brian M. Schilder, Bioinformatician IIRaj LabDepartment Neuroscience, Icahn School Medicine Mount Sinai

title: Add owner/repo — add_owner_repo
text: Try add new column named "owner_repo" combines owner name GitHub repository.

title: Add owner/repo — add_owner_repo
code: add_owner_repo(   dt,   add_ref = TRUE,   ref_cols = c("ref", "owner_repo", "repo", "package", "Package"),   sep = "/" )

title: Add owner/repo — add_owner_repo
text: dt data.table. add_ref Coalesce multiple columns (e.g. c("owner_repo","repo","package","Package")) single "ref" column. Tries fill NA values much possible. ref_cols Columns consider coalescing "ref" column. sep Separator value "owner" "repo".

title: Add owner/repo — add_owner_repo
text: data.table.

title: Add owner/repo — add_owner_repo
code: dt <- data.table::data.table(owner=letters, repo=LETTERS) dt <- add_owner_repo(dt)

code: description_authors(   desc_file,   names_only = TRUE,   add_html = FALSE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Description authors — description_authors
text: desc_file owner repo NULL, arguments inferred DESCRIPTION file. names_only return author names (subfields). example: "Jim Hester \<james.f.hester\@gmail.com\> \[aut\]" become "Jim Hester". add_html Add HTML styling certain fields (e.g "authors"). verbose Print messages.

title: Description authors — description_authors
text: Authors HTML character string.

title: DESCRIPTION file: extract fields — description_extract
text: Extract information R package's DESCRIPTION file.

title: DESCRIPTION file: extract fields — description_extract
code: description_extract(   desc_file = NULL,   refs = NULL,   fields = c("owner", "repo", "authors"),   names_only = TRUE,   add_html = FALSE,   as_datatable = FALSE,   nThread = 1,   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: DESCRIPTION file: extract fields — description_extract
text: desc_file owner repo NULL, arguments inferred DESCRIPTION file. refs Reference one GitHub repository owner/repo format  (e.g."neurogenomics/rworkflows"), R package name (e.g. "rworkflows"). fields Fields extract. names_only return author names (subfields). example: "Jim Hester \<james.f.hester\@gmail.com\> \[aut\]" become "Jim Hester". add_html Add HTML styling certain fields (e.g "authors"). as_datatable Convert results data.table. nThread Number threads parallelize queries/downloads across. verbose Print messages. ... Arguments passed rworkflows::get_description paths Paths DESCRIPTION file(s)  R package(s). db data.table R package metadata generated biocPkgList. cache_dir Directory cache downloaded files. force_new Ignore cached files re-download instead. use_wd Search local working directory (one ) DESCRIPTION files. use_repos Use R standard R package repositories like CRAN Bioc find DESCRIPTION files. repo character(1) requested Bioconductor repository. default pull "BioCsoft" repository. Possible repositories include "BioCsoft", "BioCexp", "BioCworkflows", "BioCann", "CRAN". Note repos available versions, particularly older versions.

title: GitHub branches — github_branches
text: owner Owner GitHub repository. NULL, automatically try infer owner  name DESCRIPTION file  (assuming working directory local R package repo). repo GitHub repository name. NULL, automatically try infer repo name  name DESCRIPTION file  (assuming working directory local R package repo). branch [Optional] branch supplied (character vector one branch names), check see branch exists. , branch returned. , error thrown. master_or_main branch supplied  either "master" "main", automatically interpret "master" "main" synonymous return whichever branch exists. as_datatable Return results data.table (TRUE), character vector branch names  (default: FALSE). token GitHub Personal Authentication Token (PAT). See  instructions. desc_file owner repo NULL, arguments inferred DESCRIPTION file. error Throw error matching branches fond. verbose Print messages.

See  instructions. .limit Number records return. can used instead manual pagination. default NULL, means defaults GitHub API used. can set number request (less) records, also Inf request records. what: Find, filter, and download files in a GitHub repository — github_files
title: Find, filter, and download files in a GitHub repository — github_files
text: Search files within GitHub repository filter regex query. Optionally, can download selected files local computer using original folder structure. NOTE: search private repos, make sure GitHub token supplied token argument, saved ~.Renviron file, e.g.: GITHUB_TOKEN=<token_here>

title: Find, filter, and download files in a GitHub repository — github_files
code: github_files(   owner,   repo,   branch = c("master"),   query = NULL,   ignore.case = FALSE,   method = "gh",   token = gh::gh_token(),   .limit = Inf,   download = FALSE,   download_dir = tempdir(),   overwrite = FALSE,   timeout = 5 * 60,   nThread = 1,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Find, filter, and download files in a GitHub repository — github_files
text: owner Repo owner name (can organization individual GitHub account name). repo GitHub repository name. branch branch search. query Regex query filter files . ignore.case logical. FALSE, pattern matching case       sensitive TRUE, case ignored matching. method Method perform queries : "gh" Uses R package gh. Uses GitHub token avoid query limits. "httr" Uses R package httr. flexible quickly runs webscraping limits imposed GitHub. token GitHub Personal Authentication Token (PAT). See  instructions. .limit Number records return. can used instead manual pagination. default NULL, means defaults GitHub API used. can set number request (less) records, also Inf request records. Note, request many records, multiple GitHub API calls used get , can take potentially long time. download Whether download files. downloaded file paths added new column named "path_local". download_dir Directory download files . overwrite local file already exists, overwrite . timeout long wait timing queries/downloads (units seconds). nThread Number threads parallelize queries/downloads across. verbose Print messages.

title: Find, filter, and download files in a GitHub repository — github_files
text: list paths.

title: Find, filter, and download files in a GitHub repository — github_files
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ files <- github_files(owner = "RajLabMSSM",                       repo = "Fine_Mapping_Shiny",                       query = ".md$") } # }

title: Download files from GitHub — github_files_download
text: Download files GitHub, e.g. found github_files.

title: Download files from GitHub — github_files_download
code: github_files_download(   filelist,   token = gh::gh_token(),   download_dir = tempdir(),   overwrite = FALSE,   timeout = 5 * 60,   nThread = 1,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Download files from GitHub — github_files_download
text: filelist list remote URLs download GitHub. token GitHub Personal Authentication Token (PAT). See  instructions. download_dir Directory download files . overwrite local file already exists, overwrite . timeout long wait timing queries/downloads (units seconds). nThread Number threads parallelize queries/downloads across. verbose Print messages.

title: Download files from GitHub — github_files_download

title: GitHub user events — github_user_events
text: owner Repo owner name (can organization individual GitHub account name). error Throw error GitHub repository exist (default: TRUE). token GitHub Personal Authentication Token (PAT). See  instructions. .limit Number records return. can used instead manual pagination. default NULL, means defaults GitHub API used. can set number request (less) records, also Inf request records. Note, request many records, multiple GitHub API calls used get , can take potentially long time. public_only include public events. include private events well,set public_only=FALSE provide valid GitHub token. as_datatable Return query results data.table instead nested list. verbose Print messages.

title: R repositories — r_repos

R repositories extract data . cast Cast results wide format package appears one row. fields Fields extract. version (Optional) character(1) package_version indicating Bioconductor version (e.g., "3.8") repositories required. nThread Number threads parallelise add_descriptions step across. token GitHub Personal Authentication Token (PAT). title: echogithub 1.0.0
text: Fix data.table recycling warning r_repos_data. Remove data.table::setDTthreads(threads = 1) .onLoad() silently throttled data.table performance entire R session. Fix Rd formatting \dontrun{} example guards. Add Rplots.pdf *.tbi .gitignore.

title: echogithub 0.99.5
text: Local R CMD check fixes compatibility updates.

title: echogithub 0.99.4
text: New function github_dependents_scrape. Standardize rworkflows.yml canonical template: enable Docker ghcr.io, set write-permissions, use GITHUB_TOKEN, add devel/RELEASE_** branch triggers.

title: echogithub 0.99.4
text: Remove deprecated get_github_url. Refactor github_dependents update github_files_download. Sync documentation devtools::document().

title: echogithub 0.99.3
text: Handle repos 100 branches. Can now download files private repos.

title: echogithub 0.99.2
text: echogithub::description_find –> rworkflows::get_description echogithub::github_hex –> rworkflows::get_hex echogithub::readme_header –> rworkflows::use_badges Add new arg add_hex find hex URL rworkflows::get_hex. New arg queries github_user_events Expose .limit arg wherever relevant.

title: echogithub 0.99.2
text: Gather deps pages (just first one). Fix handle complex situations without explicit naming field. Add check find R packages GitHub just available via githubinstall (lot, since became outdated years ago).

title: echogithub 0.99.1
text: github_permissions github_metadata github_commits github_traffic github_dependents github_dependencies r_repos r_repos_data r_repos_downloads r_repos_opts Added robust func get GH url: get_github_url()

title: echogithub 0.99.1
text: Elevate rvest Imports. Add parallel Imports. Split queries batches prevent issues requesting many packages . Parallelise.

title: echogithub 0.99.0
text: Added NEWS.md file track changes package. Moved GitHub-related functions echodata echogithub. Automatically infers owner/repo/branches. Automatically translates main/master correct synonym.

title: echogithub 0.99.0
text: Kept httr alternative method. Add RCurl::url.exists check.
